doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process, contradicting actual tenant protections under the Forcible Entry and Detainer Act.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document grossly misrepresents Illinois eviction law—tenants receiving a 5-day notice do NOT have an obligation to vacate without a court order, and the claim that HUD co-issued this with the Illinois Attorney General is implausible and contradicts tenant protection standards both agencies actually uphold.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process, contradicting actual tenant protections under the Forcible Entry and Detainer Act.
